Required replacements before publishing:

1. Add the final invitation PDF here:
   public/invitation.pdf

2. Optional couple photo:
   public/couple.jpg
   Recommended: portrait or soft landscape crop, at least 1600px wide.

3. Optional background music:
   public/music.mp3
   Keep it subtle, short and compressed.

4. Optional social preview image:
   public/og-image.jpg
   Recommended size: 1200 x 630.
